initial_candidates.sql:
WITH regional_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        hw.region,
        ws.id AS rep_id,
        ws.name AS rep_name,
        COUNT(wo.id) AS order_count,
        SUM(wo.total_amt_usd) AS total_sales,
        SUM(wo.total_amt_usd) AS rep_sales
    FROM web_orders wo
    JOIN web_accounts wa ON wo.account_id = wa.id
    JOIN web_sales_reps ws ON wa.sales_rep_id = ws.id
    JOIN hardware_dim_customer hw ON ws.region_id = hw.region
    GROUP BY hw.region, ws.id, ws.name
),
max_rep_sales_per_region AS (
    SELECT 
        region,
        MAX(rep_sales) AS max_sales
    FROM regional_sales
    GROUP BY region
)
SELECT 
    rs.region,
    rs.rep_name,
    rs.order_count,
    rs.total_sales,
    rs.rep_sales
FROM regional_sales rs
JOIN max_rep_sales_per_region mrs 
    ON rs.region = mrs.region AND rs.rep_sales = mrs.max_sales
ORDER BY rs.region ASC, rs.rep_sales DESC;

WITH regional_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        hc.region,
        ws.id AS rep_id,
        ws.name AS rep_name,
        COUNT(wo.id) AS order_count,
        SUM(wo.total_amt_usd) AS rep_sales
    FROM web_orders wo
    JOIN web_accounts wa ON wo.account_id = wa.id
    JOIN web_sales_reps ws ON wa.sales_rep_id = ws.id
    JOIN hardware_dim_customer hc ON ws.region_id = hc.region
    GROUP BY hc.region, ws.id, ws.name
),
max_sales_per_region AS (
    SELECT 
        region,
        MAX(rep_sales) AS max_rep_sales
    FROM regional_sales
    GROUP BY region
)
SELECT 
    rs.region,
    rs.rep_name,
    rs.order_count,
    rs.rep_sales
FROM regional_sales rs
JOIN max_sales_per_region msr 
    ON rs.region = msr.region AND rs.rep_sales = msr.max_rep_sales
ORDER BY rs.region ASC, rs.rep_sales DESC;

WITH rep_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        h.region,
        wsr.id AS rep_id,
        wsr.name AS rep_name,
        COUNT(wo.id) AS order_count,
        SUM(wo.total_amt_usd) AS rep_sales
    FROM web_orders wo
    JOIN web_accounts wa ON wo.account_id = wa.id
    JOIN web_sales_reps wsr ON wa.sales_rep_id = wsr.id
    JOIN hardware_dim_customer h ON wsr.region_id = h.region
    GROUP BY h.region, wsr.id, wsr.name
),
max_sales_per_region AS (
    SELECT 
        region,
        MAX(rep_sales) AS max_rep_sales
    FROM rep_sales
    GROUP BY region
)
SELECT 
    rs.region,
    rs.rep_name,
    rs.rep_sales,
    rs.order_count,
    SUM(rs.rep_sales) OVER (PARTITION BY rs.region) AS total_sales
FROM rep_sales rs
JOIN max_sales_per_region msr ON rs.region = msr.region AND rs.rep_sales = msr.max_rep_sales
ORDER BY rs.region ASC, rs.rep_sales DESC;

WITH rep_sales_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        hc.region,
        ws.id AS rep_id,
        ws.name AS rep_name,
        COUNT(wo.id) AS order_count,
        SUM(wo.total_amt_usd) AS rep_sales
    FROM web_orders wo
    JOIN web_accounts wa ON wo.account_id = wa.id
    JOIN web_sales_reps ws ON wa.sales_rep_id = ws.id
    JOIN hardware_dim_customer hc ON ws.region_id = hc.region
    GROUP BY hc.region, ws.id, ws.name
),
max_sales_per_region AS (
    SELECT 
        region,
        MAX(rep_sales) AS max_rep_sales
    FROM rep_sales_summary
    GROUP BY region
)
SELECT 
    rss.region,
    COUNT(DISTINCT rss.rep_id) OVER (PARTITION BY rss.region) AS num_reps,
    SUM(rss.rep_sales) OVER (PARTITION BY rss.region) AS total_sales,
    rss.rep_name,
    rss.rep_sales
FROM rep_sales_summary rss
JOIN max_sales_per_region msr 
    ON rss.region = msr.region AND rss.rep_sales = msr.max_rep_sales
ORDER BY rss.region ASC, rss.rep_sales DESC;
initial_candidates.exec_error: DISTINCT is not supported for window functions

initial_candidates.sql:
WITH regional_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        hc.region,
        sr.id AS rep_id,
        sr.name AS rep_name,
        COUNT(wo.id) AS order_count,
        SUM(wo.total_amt_usd) AS rep_sales
    FROM web_orders wo
    JOIN web_accounts wa ON wo.account_id = wa.id
    JOIN web_sales_reps sr ON wa.sales_rep_id = sr.id
    JOIN hardware_dim_customer hc ON sr.region_id = hc.region
    GROUP BY hc.region, sr.id, sr.name
),
max_sales_per_region AS (
    SELECT 
        region,
        MAX(rep_sales) AS max_sales
    FROM regional_sales
    GROUP BY region
)
SELECT 
    rs.region,
    rs.rep_name,
    rs.rep_sales,
    rs.order_count
FROM regional_sales rs
JOIN max_sales_per_region msp ON rs.region = msp.region AND rs.rep_sales = msp.max_sales
ORDER BY rs.region ASC, rs.rep_sales DESC;
